ksa_text: Skill in deploying, configuring, and scaling data platform components using infrastructure-as-code with version control and automated testing.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("version control", "automat test", "infrastructure.as.code"). STRM composite score is strong (0.4245, top tier for this dataset); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.
